---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #128...<br>[List Tables!!]{.bangers}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: https://pixel.disco.nowtv.com/uuid/20809a1a-838b-3fa1-aa72-c4157907893f/LAND_16_9?language=en-GB&proposition=NOWOTT&version=afad5e92-4db1-39e7-8189-2d427a72dc0c
#  data-background-opacity: ".7"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://png.pngtree.com/png-vector/20230808/ourmid/pngtree-kitchen-table-clipart-cartoon-sytle-isolated-on-white-with-table-and-vector-png-image_6868363.png   #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #127
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[List Tables!!]{.bangers}](https://quarto.org/docs/blog/posts/2026-03-24-1.9-release/#list-tables)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/4_28_26">
  <img src="/img/title127.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#127: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://apps.odoo.com/web/image/loempia.module/140445/icon_image?unique=9aa3160){.absolute top="320" right="115" height="140"}

## [[Publishing via Posit Connect Cloud {{< iconify streamline-color:cloud-share >}}]{.positron .bigger}](https://quarto.org/docs/publishing/posit-connect-cloud.html)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="55%"}

+ [sign--up](https://connect.posit.cloud/) for free acount 
+ use `rsconnect` package (from within {{< iconify devicon:rstudio >}}) to connect 
+ within console, run `rsconnect::connectCloudUser()`
  + this will walk you through authentication

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

+ you will now have single--button publishing capability:

:::

:::

![](../../../img/publish.png){.absolute right="-120" bottom="50"}

![](https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/8365/8365149.png){.absolute bottom="50" left="-150" height="200"}

# Today...

![](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExN3luMzNqeDN4endudmN1YXp2MnpsdmdzbGxhcGVkam40dWs5eGQ3ZSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/5yYoECDolGySFHKZYl/giphy.gif)

## [[List Tables!!]{.bangers}](https://quarto.org/docs/blog/posts/2026-03-24-1.9-release/#list-tables)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

Combine different object types within the same table -- permits complex mashups:  

+ e.g., code blocks alongside "normal" table elements


:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

::: {.list-table}
- - Function
  - Description

- - `sum()`
  - Adds values:

    ```r
    sum(1, 2, 3)
    ```

- - `nrow()`
  - Number of rows:

    - e.g., dataframes
    - `ncol()` for width

:::

:::

:::

![](https://png.pngtree.com/png-vector/20230728/ourmid/pngtree-picnic-table-vector-png-image_6990714.png){.absolute right="-120" top="-70"}

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`

:::

:::
